sections.paragraph: m. something very precious or noble. Deu 33:13, מֶגֶד שָׁמַיִם “the precious things of heaven,” i.e. (as immediately follows) rain, dew. Deu 33:14, מֶגֶד תְּבוּאֹות שֶׁמֶשׁ “the precious things put forth by the sun.” Deu 33:15, 16 Deu 33:16. Son 4:13, פְּרִי מְגָדִים “most precious fruits.” Son 4:16, and even without פְרִי, 7:14 , בָּל־מְגָדִים “all most precious things,” fruits are intended. Vulg. everywhere poma. (Syr. ܡܰܓܕܐܳ dried fruit.)
